mapper.select: SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE as title, DESCRIPTION as description, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') as status, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST ORDER BY QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT q.QUEST_ID as questId, q.TITLE as title, q.DESCRIPTION as description, q.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, NVL(qr.AVERAGE_RATING, 0) as averageRating, NVL(qr.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) as reviewCount, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') as status, q.CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST q LEFT JOIN ( SELECT QUEST_ID, ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1) as AVERAGE_RATING, COUNT(*) as REVIEW_COUNT FROM LQ_QUEST_REVIEW GROUP BY QUEST_ID ) qr ON q.QUEST_ID = qr.QUEST_ID WHERE NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') != 'DELETED' ORDER BY q.QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE as title, DESCRIPTION as description, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') as status, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') != 'DELETED' ORDER BY QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT q.QUEST_ID as questId, q.TITLE as title, q.DESCRIPTION as description, q.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, q.STATUS as status, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID as questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID as locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER as visitOrder, l.NAME as locationName, l.ADDRESS as address, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, l.LATITUDE as latitude, l.LONGITUDE as longitude, l.LOCATION_TYPE as locationType, l.LOCATION_CATEGORY as locationCategory FROM LQ_QUEST q INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql ON q.QUEST_ID = ql.QUEST_ID INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND ql.VISIT_ORDER = ( SELECT MIN(ql2.VISIT_ORDER) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql2 WHERE ql2.QUEST_ID = q.QUEST_ID ) AND l.LATITUDE IS NOT NULL AND l.LONGITUDE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY q.QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT q.QUEST_ID as questId, q.TITLE as title, q.DESCRIPTION as description, q.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, q.STATUS as status, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID as questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID as locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER as visitOrder, l.NAME as locationName, l.ADDRESS as address, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, l.LATITUDE as latitude, l.LONGITUDE as longitude, l.LOCATION_TYPE as locationType, l.LOCATION_CATEGORY as locationCategory, ROUND(NVL(AVG(r.RATING), 0), 1) as reviewAverage, COUNT(r.REVIEW_ID) as reviewCount FROM LQ_QUEST q INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql ON q.QUEST_ID = ql.QUEST_ID INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN LQ_QUEST_REVIEW r ON q.QUEST_ID = r.QUEST_ID WHERE q.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ql.VISIT_ORDER = ( SELECT MIN(ql2.VISIT_ORDER) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql2 WHERE ql2.QUEST_ID = q.QUEST_ID ) GROUP BY q.QUEST_ID, q.TITLE, q.DESCRIPTION, q.REWARD_EXP, q.REWARD_POINT, q.TIME_LIMIT, q.STATUS, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID, ql.LOCATION_ID, ql.VISIT_ORDER, l.NAME, l.ADDRESS, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL, l.LATITUDE, l.LONGITUDE, l.LOCATION_TYPE, l.LOCATION_CATEGORY ORDER BY ROUND(NVL(AVG(r.RATING), 0), 1) DESC, COUNT(r.REVIEW_ID) DESC, q.QUEST_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{_parameter, jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT q.QUEST_ID as questId, q.TITLE as title, q.DESCRIPTION as description, q.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, NVL(qr.AVERAGE_RATING, 0) as averageRating, NVL(qr.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) as reviewCount, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') as status, q.CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST q LEFT JOIN ( SELECT QUEST_ID, ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1) as AVERAGE_RATING, COUNT(*) as REVIEW_COUNT FROM LQ_QUEST_REVIEW GROUP BY QUEST_ID ) qr ON q.QUEST_ID = qr.QUEST_ID WHERE q.QUEST_ID = #{questId}

SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE as title, DESCRIPTION as description, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') as status, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE QUEST_ID = #{questId}

SELECT ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID as questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID as locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER as visitOrder, l.NAME as name, l.ZIP_CODE as zipCode, l.ADDRESS as address, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, l.LATITUDE as latitude, l.LONGITUDE as longitude, l.LOCATION_TYPE as locationType, l.LOCATION_CATEGORY as locationCategory, l.DESCRIPTION as description FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = #{questId} ORDER BY ql.VISIT_ORDER ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_QUEST SET TITLE = #{title}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, REWARD_EXP = #{rewardExp}, REWARD_POINT = #{rewardPoint}, TIME_LIMIT = #{timeLimit} WHERE QUEST_ID = #{questId}
UPDATE LQ_QUEST SET STATUS = 'INACTIVE' WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND TIME_LIMIT IS NOT NULL AND TIME_LIMIT > 0 AND SIGN(SYSDATE - (CREATED_AT + (TIME_LIMIT / 1440))) IN (0, 1)
UPDATE LQ_QUEST SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', CREATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE QUEST_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_QUEST_PK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_QUEST ( QUEST_ID, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, REWARD_EXP, REWARD_POINT, TIME_LIMIT, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{questId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{rewardExp}, #{rewardPoint}, #{timeLimit}, NVL(#{status}, 'ACTIVE') )
mapper.select:
SELECT q.QUEST_ID as questId, q.TITLE as title, q.DESCRIPTION as description, q.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, NVL(qr.AVERAGE_RATING, 0) as averageRating, NVL(qr.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) as reviewCount, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') as status, q.CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST q LEFT JOIN ( SELECT QUEST_ID, ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1) as AVERAGE_RATING, COUNT(*) as REVIEW_COUNT FROM LQ_QUEST_REVIEW GROUP BY QUEST_ID ) qr ON q.QUEST_ID = qr.QUEST_ID WHERE NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') != 'DELETED'
AND NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = #{status}
AND q.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY q.QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE as title, DESCRIPTION as description, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') as status, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') != 'DELETED'
AND NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = #{status}
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY QUEST_ID DESC
